The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. This routine is for anyone who is not dealing with extreme damage but wants over all glossier & softer hair this is the the exact routine I built for getting glass hair on fine hair but will work for the wavy curly hair girls too!!  the science: the flatten your cuticle lies, the more light it reflects that's what gives the illusion of glass. glossy hair isn't a product, it's the consistency of routine over time that’s keeping that cuticle smooth from prewash to final styling  it took me a while to figure out the system, but once I did, the results compounded and now I wanna share my favourite tips with you because this is the routine that actually for every  wash day. the 5 things I never skip: 1. always create a barrier before shampoo: hair oil or conditioner first. less friction = less cuticle damage = more shine 2. weekly hair mask. deep hydration is what keeps that cuticle flat and the shine consistent. 3. a glossing treatment every 3-4 weeks  this is the step that takes glossy to glass  4. leave-in conditioner every single wash. beats frizz and keeps the cuticle flat between washes. 5. the hair sandwich method oil before heat styling AND after. then always finish with a cool shot to lock the cuticle in place ✨ Hope these haircare tips help you guys!! #hair #haircare #glasshair #hairgloss

🚨🐾 richiesta di intervento per il trasferimento in emergenza di una cagnolina con una grave emorragia tracheale, dopo aver aspirato il sangue emorragico è stato inserito un tracheotubo così da permettere alla cagnolina di respirare e mantenere la sedazione,  durante il trasferimento la Dott.ssa Rocca, specialista in anestesia, con non poche difficoltà dovute anche ai movimenti del mezzo ha mantenuto pervio il tracheotubo provvedendo ad aspirare e ossigenare la cagnolina durante il trasferimento , arrivati alla clinica CMV clinica veterinaria AniCura di Varese la cagnolina è stata presa in carico dallo staff medico che attendeva il nostro arrivo 🙏🏻❤️. Grazie alla sinergia tra cliniche veterinarie, medici veterinari a bordo della nostra ambulanza e soccorritori veterinari in supporto dello staff medico, si è potuto realizzare un trasferimento che fino pochi anni fa sarebbe stato difficilmente realizzabile ❤️❤️❤️ Grazie alla Dott.ssa Rocca per il suo prezioso e indispensabile  supporto  💞. #ambulanzaveterinariaets #vet #veterinaria #soccorsoanimali #emergenza
